title: Upload → OCR → Evidence Blocks → Pipeline SSE + Retry Endpoint + Stale Detection Cron + Document Versions
description: Implements the full Slice 2 ingestion and pipeline status loop: document upload, version management, category tagging, evidence blocks, and SSE pipeline events. Uses PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector + pg_trgm with Drizzle ORM, BullMQ + Redis queues, Cloudflare R2 object storage, Next.js App Router, Auth.js JWT sessions, PaddleOCR-VL 1.5, OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, and strict TypeScript. Auth claims are { user_id, company_id, role }. Queue contracts remain global for the project: ocr-job(180000), embedding-job(120000), extraction-job(300000), semantic-conflict-job(60000), render-pdf-job(90000), pending-obs-timeout(30000).

env_vars_required.description: PostgreSQL DSN for app and worker DB access
Redis DSN used by BullMQ and SSE pub/sub
Bucket storing originals and page PNGs
Auth.js canonical URL for cookie/session handling
Public frontend app URL for client-side navigation and callbacks

files.purpose: Documents list page with SSR data fetch and SSE-driven status updates

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Server component fetches GET /api/documents?page=1&limit=20, renders DocumentsTable and UploadButton, mounts PipelineSSEProvider-aware client child for optimistic status updates. Empty state text is exactly 'Importez votre premier document'. Role guard blocks viewers from upload action. Uses session claims from src/lib/auth.ts auth() and never reads company_id from query params.

files.purpose: Read-only document detail metadata with latest version state

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Fetches GET /api/documents/{id}, displays original filename, category, latest version pipeline status, page count, file size, created timestamp. Includes links to /api/documents/{id}/versions and /api/documents/{id}/blocks consumers. Strictly read-only in Slice 2.

files.purpose: Generate presigned PUT URL after upload metadata validation

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: POST handler authenticates with src/lib/auth.ts auth(); rejects unauthenticated 401. Validates body via src/lib/uploads/validate.ts: filename(1..255), fileSize<=52428800, mimeType in allowlist, pageCount 1..200, categoryId UUID|null and same-tenant category. Uses src/lib/uploads/presign.ts generateUploadUrl(companyId, extension) built on src/lib/r2.ts r2Client and bucket env, returns { uploadUrl, objectKey, expiresIn:900 }. Error codes: file_too_large, unsupported_mime_type, page_count_exceeded, invalid_category.

files.purpose: Finalize upload, create document/version records, enqueue OCR

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: POST handler authenticates and validates objectKey pattern with company prefix guard. Performs R2 HEAD existence check. Idempotency check on document_version.object_key returns 200 existing payload and does not enqueue duplicate job. On first completion: insert document, insert document_version(status uploaded), insert pipeline_run(running), enqueue ocr-job with BullMQ queue from src/lib/queues.ts, publish pipeline_stage_changed via src/lib/pipeline/pubsub.ts. Uses withTenant from src/lib/db/rls.ts and schema symbols from src/lib/db/schema/documents.ts and src/lib/db/schema/pipeline.ts.

files.purpose: Paginated documents list with filters and latest version status

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: GET handler supports page, limit, status, categoryId, q. Queries documents plus latest document_version per document ordered created_at DESC. Returns {data,total,page,pageSize}. pipelineStatus reflects latest version only. Uses withTenant and trgm search on document title where q is present.

files.purpose: Single document metadata and latest version envelope

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: GET handler fetches document by id under tenant scope, joins latest version by created_at desc. Returns 404 when no row due to not found or RLS zero-row.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: GET returns all versions for document sorted latest first including failed versions and pipeline_error fields. Returns 404 for missing/inaccessible document.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: GET returns latest version pipelineStatus and pipelineError only. Used as fallback when SSE unavailable.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: GET supports page, limit, lowConfidence filter, excludes chunk_type='superseded' unless includeSuperseeded=true. Returns hasEmbedding boolean and never returns embedding vector bytes. Maps bbox float[4] to object {x1,y1,x2,y2}.

files.purpose: Presigned GET URL for page PNG

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: GET validates pageNumber range against latest document_version.page_count, requires pipeline_status >= ocr_done else 404 code page_not_ready with current status. Returns presigned URL valid 3600 seconds for key {company_id}/{document_version_id}/pages/{n}.png.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: POST with no body, auth required, forbids viewer role with 403. Loads latest version and allows retry when status=failed or status in processing states with pipeline_status_updated_at older than 10 minutes. Resets to uploaded, clears error, enqueues ocr-job, inserts pipeline_run running, publishes pipeline_stage_changed. Returns 409 for non-retriable active states.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: PATCH requires editor/admin. Validates category belongs to tenant when non-null; updates document.category_id; inserts audit_log record. Returns updatedAt timestamp. Errors: 403 viewer, 404 not found, 422 invalid_category.

files.purpose: SSE endpoint for pipeline events with heartbeat and replay

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: GET opens text/event-stream for authenticated user. Company scope comes only from auth session claims; query company_id ignored. Subscribes redisSub to pipeline:events:{company_id}. Emits heartbeat event every 30s. Supports Last-Event-ID replay using in-memory per-company ring buffer (max 200, ttl 60s) containing monotonic id and payload. On disconnect unsubscribe and cleanup.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Renders paginated rows with filename, category, client, createdAt, and DocumentStatusBadge. Accepts optimistic status updates from usePipelineStream hook keyed by documentVersionId/documentId mapping.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Maps statuses: uploaded/pending→En attente, ocr_processing→OCR en cours…, ocr_done→OCR terminé, embedding→Analyse…, embedded→Analysé, failed→Échec. Uses Framer Motion pulse only on active processing states.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Validates local file constraints before network: size <= 50MB, mime allowlist, pdf page count <= 200 via pdfjs-dist. Calls /api/uploads/init, executes XHR PUT to R2 with progress events, then calls /api/uploads/complete. Handles success optimistic insertion.

files.purpose: Upload progress and expiry retry UX

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Shows percent progress during R2 PUT. On 403 presigned-url expiry, auto-retries exactly once by requesting /api/uploads/init and restarting PUT from 0%. Displays French retry message during automatic retry and terminal French error with manual retry button after second 403. Non-403 errors stop immediately without automatic retry.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Maintains one EventSource per session to /api/pipeline/events. Reconnect uses exponential backoff 1s..30s, sends Last-Event-ID header when reconnecting, exposes subscribe/unsubscribe callbacks via React context.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Provides typed handlers for pipeline_stage_changed, pipeline_failed, extraction_complete; supports filtering by documentId/documentVersionId and emits state updates for status badges.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Exports generateUploadUrl(companyId, ext) that builds object key {companyId}/{uuidv7}/original.{ext} and signs PUT for 900s using @aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner against src/lib/r2.ts r2Client and R2_BUCKET. Enforces intended Content-Type and expected length constraints from validated metadata.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Defines zod schemas for init and complete payloads and maps failures to stable error codes: file_too_large, unsupported_mime_type, page_count_exceeded, object_not_found, invalid_category. objectKey regex enforces {company}/{uuid}/original.(pdf|png|jpg|jpeg|webp).

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Defines TypeScript discriminated union for SSE events: pipeline_stage_changed, pipeline_failed, extraction_complete, heartbeat. Each event includes timestamp ISO string and monotonic event id for Last-Event-ID replay.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Exports publishPipelineEvent(companyId,event) publishing JSON payload to channel pipeline:events:{companyId} using symbol redis from src/lib/redis.ts.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Converts PDF buffers to per-page PNG at density 150 DPI using pdf2pic and system dependencies ghostscript + graphicsmagick. Returns ordered page buffers and dimensions for normalization. Image uploads are treated as single-page input.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Sends per-page base64 PNG requests to PADDLEOCR_API_URL with PADDLEOCR_TOKEN auth, parses HTTP/network failures into explicit OCR-stage errors for DLQ handling.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Maps OCR boxes/text/scores arrays into ParsedBlock records, normalizes pixel bbox to [0,1] ratios, clamps bounds, assigns block_type by heuristic (table_cell vs paragraph), and computes low_confidence flag using LOW_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD from src/lib/constants.ts.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Uses tiktoken cl100k_base to compute token counts for merge/split decisions with deterministic behavior across worker runs.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Merges adjacent same-type paragraph blocks on same page when vertical gap threshold and <=512 combined tokens are satisfied. Produces merged chunk entries and marks originals as superseded with merged_block_ids lineage.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Splits any block exceeding 512 tokens at nearest sentence boundary near cutoff and outputs child chunks with parent_block_id reference and chunk_type split.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Embeds text arrays with model text-embedding-3-small in batches of 512 max. Returns 1536-d vectors and per-batch error envelopes so failed batches can be marked embedding_status=failed without aborting the whole job.

files.purpose: Mount pipeline SSE provider once per app session

sections.label: Patch
sections.content: Wrap existing authenticated layout content with PipelineSSEProvider so all pages can subscribe to pipeline events without creating duplicate EventSource connections.

files.purpose: Register OCR/embedding consumers and health endpoint

sections.label: Patch
sections.content: Initialize worker process, register ocr-job and embedding-job consumers, attach failed handlers to dlq.ts, start health server on port 3002 via workers/pipeline/health.ts, and schedule stale pipeline sweep every 5 minutes.

files.purpose: Dedicated Drizzle/Postgres pool for pipeline worker process

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Exports workerDb and pool configured separately from app server with min 1 and max 5 connections for long-running queue consumers. Uses DATABASE_URL and shares schema modules from src/lib/db/schema/* while keeping worker lifecycle ownership in workers/pipeline/index.ts.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Starts HTTP server exposing GET /health returning {status:'ok', active_jobs, uptime_s}.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Implements status gate idempotency, status transitions uploaded→ocr_processing→ocr_done, R2 file fetch, pdf2pic conversion, per-page PaddleOCR, bbox normalization, chunking merge/split pipeline, bulk insert evidence blocks, page PNG upload to R2, event publishing, and enqueue embedding-job. Allows re-entry from ocr_processing and failed for crash recovery/retry endpoint.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Implements status gate idempotency, status transitions ocr_done→embedding→embedded, selects embeddable blocks (not low_confidence and not superseded with embedding null), embeds in batches of 512, updates vectors and embedding_status, tolerates partial batch failure, publishes events, and enqueues extraction-job for Slice 3.

files.purpose: Terminal failure handler for pipeline jobs

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: On exhausted retries updates document_version.pipeline_status='failed', sets pipeline_error_message, marks pipeline_run failed, inserts notification(type pipeline_failed), and publishes pipeline_failed SSE event with stage and error text.

sections.label: Implementation
sections.content: Every 5 minutes finds document_versions stuck in ocr_processing, embedding, extracting for >10 minutes by pipeline_status_updated_at, marks failed with message 'Pipeline stalled — timed out', inserts notification, and emits pipeline_failed event.

validation_rules: categoryId when provided must exist in same company
implementation_notes: Authenticate with auth() from src/lib/auth.ts and derive company_id from JWT {user_id,company_id,role}
Use generateUploadUrl from src/lib/uploads/presign.ts with r2Client and R2_BUCKET from src/lib/r2.ts
Validation schemas in src/lib/uploads/validate.ts
Queue contracts and timeout constants remain defined in src/lib/queues.ts and src/lib/constants.ts

validation_rules: objectKey must match tenant prefix and naming pattern
R2 HEAD must confirm object exists
Idempotency: existing objectKey returns existing ids with 200
implementation_notes: Use withTenant() from src/lib/db/rls.ts for all inserts/reads
Insert into symbols in src/lib/db/schema/documents.ts: document, documentVersion
Insert pipeline run using symbol from src/lib/db/schema/pipeline.ts
Enqueue on queue symbol ocrQueue in src/lib/queues.ts with timeout 180000
Publish SSE event using publishPipelineEvent in src/lib/pipeline/pubsub.ts

validation_rules: status when present must be known pipeline_status enum
implementation_notes: Read documents and latest versions from src/lib/db/schema/documents.ts
Use RLS wrapper withTenant from src/lib/db/rls.ts
Sort by created_at DESC and return latest version pipeline status
RLS-enforced lookup via withTenant from src/lib/db/rls.ts
Include failed versions and sort latest first
Use latest document version only
Never serialize embedding vectors in API body

validation_rules: pipeline_status must be ocr_done or beyond
implementation_notes: Generate presigned GET using src/lib/r2.ts client and tenant key prefix

validation_rules: Retriable when status=failed OR stalled processing > 10 minutes
implementation_notes: Enqueue ocr-job on src/lib/queues.ts ocrQueue and publish stage change

validation_rules: categoryId non-null must exist in tenant
implementation_notes: Insert audit_log record using src/lib/db/schema/notifications.ts auditLog table, with entity_type='document', action='category_changed'

validation_rules: company scope strictly from JWT session, not query params
implementation_notes: Subscriber client symbol redisSub from src/lib/redis.ts
Channel format pipeline:events:{company_id}
Supports Last-Event-ID replay with per-company 60s buffer

steps.label: Gate
steps.detail: Load document_version and branch by pipeline_status: skip if already at or beyond ocr_done; allow re-entry for ocr_processing and failed; proceed for uploaded.

steps.label: Status update
steps.detail: Set pipeline_status='ocr_processing', pipeline_status_updated_at=now(), publish pipeline_stage_changed event.

steps.label: Run row
steps.detail: Insert or update pipeline_run as running with started_at now.

steps.label: Fetch source
steps.detail: Download original file from R2 object_key into temp buffer; hard fail on missing object.

steps.label: Rasterization
steps.detail: If PDF, convert to page PNG buffers at 150 DPI via pdf2pic; if image, wrap as single-page list.

steps.label: OCR per page
steps.detail: For each page with concurrency max 4: base64 encode PNG, call PaddleOCR-VL 1.5, parse boxes/text/scores, normalize bboxes to ratios [0..1], upload page image to R2 pages/{n}.png.

steps.label: Chunking
steps.detail: Run merge+split: merge adjacent paragraph blocks under 512 tokens and split oversized blocks over 512 tokens at sentence boundaries; produce superseded lineage.

steps.label: Persist blocks
steps.detail: Bulk insert evidence_blocks with low_confidence = ocr_confidence < LOW_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD and embedding null, embedding_status pending.

steps.label: Finalize OCR
steps.detail: Update document_version page_count actual and pipeline_status='ocr_done', update pipeline_run completed, publish pipeline_stage_changed.

steps.label: Fan-out next stage
steps.detail: Enqueue embedding-job with documentVersionId/companyId and insert queued pipeline_run record for embedding stage.

error_handling: BullMQ retries with exponential backoff 1s then 4s
On terminal failure call workers/pipeline/dlq.ts: set pipeline_status failed, write pipeline_error_message, notification insert, publish pipeline_failed
Idempotent safety avoids duplicate block insertion when rerun after ocr_done

steps.label: Gate
steps.detail: Load document_version and skip if already embedded or beyond; allow re-entry from embedding; proceed from ocr_done.

steps.label: Status update
steps.detail: Set pipeline_status='embedding' and publish pipeline_stage_changed.

steps.label: Candidate scan
steps.detail: Select evidence blocks where document_version_id matches, low_confidence=false, chunk_type!='superseded', embedding IS NULL.

steps.label: Batch partition
steps.detail: Split selected blocks into batches of at most 512 texts.

steps.label: External embedding call
steps.detail: For each batch call OpenAI text-embedding-3-small and map outputs back to block IDs in order.

steps.label: Persist vectors
steps.detail: Bulk update embedding vector and embedding_status='completed' for successful batch items.

steps.label: Partial-failure isolation
steps.detail: On batch failure mark only that batch embedding_status='failed' and continue remaining batches.

steps.label: Finalize embedding
steps.detail: Set document_version pipeline_status='embedded', update pipeline_run done, publish pipeline_stage_changed.

steps.label: Queue extraction
steps.detail: Enqueue extraction-job for Slice 3 and insert queued extraction pipeline_run.

error_handling: Single batch failures do not abort job; extraction still runs with reduced evidence set
Terminal failure path routes through dlq.ts and pipeline_failed event
Skip branch logs warning if status still before ocr_done

background_jobs.trigger: Repeat every 5 minutes from worker bootstrap

steps.label: Find stalled versions
steps.detail: Query document_version rows in statuses ocr_processing, embedding, extracting where pipeline_status_updated_at < now()-interval '10 minutes'.

steps.label: Mark failed
steps.detail: Update each matched row to pipeline_status='failed' and pipeline_error_message='Pipeline stalled — timed out'.

steps.label: Notify
steps.detail: Insert notification rows type pipeline_failed and publish pipeline_failed SSE events.

steps.label: Audit run
steps.detail: Record counts in worker logs for observability.

error_handling: If sweep fails, next repeat run retries naturally
Updates are idempotent because already-failed rows are excluded by query predicate

types_and_interfaces.name: PipelineEvent
types_and_interfaces.definition: type PipelineEvent = { id: number; type: 'pipeline_stage_changed'; documentVersionId: string; documentId: string; pipelineStatus: 'uploaded'|'ocr_processing'|'ocr_done'|'embedding'|'embedded'|'extracting'|'review_ready'|'failed'; timestamp: string } | { id: number; type: 'pipeline_failed'; documentVersionId: string; documentId: string; stage: 'ocr'|'embedding'|'extraction'; error: string; timestamp: string } | { id: number; type: 'extraction_complete'; documentVersionId: string; documentId: string; observationCount: number; timestamp: string } | { id: number; type: 'heartbeat'; timestamp: string };

types_and_interfaces.name: UploadInitRequest
types_and_interfaces.definition: interface UploadInitRequest { filename: string; fileSize: number; mimeType: 'application/pdf'|'image/png'|'image/jpeg'|'image/webp'|'image/tiff'; pageCount: number; categoryId: string | null; }

types_and_interfaces.name: UploadCompleteRequest
types_and_interfaces.definition: interface UploadCompleteRequest { objectKey: string; filename: string; pageCount: number; categoryId: string | null; clientId: string | null; }

types_and_interfaces.name: ParsedBlock
types_and_interfaces.definition: interface ParsedBlock { tempId: string; pageNumber: number; bbox: [number, number, number, number]; text: string; blockType: 'paragraph'|'table_cell'|'header'|'list_item'|'figure_caption'|'other'; ocrConfidence: number; lowConfidence: boolean; chunkType: 'original'|'merged'|'split'|'superseded'; mergedBlockIds: string[] | null; parentBlockId: string | null; }

types_and_interfaces.name: ChunkingResult
types_and_interfaces.definition: interface ChunkingResult { blocksToInsert: ParsedBlock[]; supersededMap: Record<string, string[]>; }

types_and_interfaces.name: EmbeddingBatchResult
types_and_interfaces.definition: interface EmbeddingBatchResult { blockIds: string[]; vectors: number[][]; failed: boolean; error: string | null; }

constants.name: LOW_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD
constants.purpose: Flag OCR blocks below confidence threshold and skip embedding

constants.name: EXTRACTION_JOB_TIMEOUT_MS
constants.purpose: Global queue contract retained for next slice

constants.name: SEMANTIC_CONFLICT_JOB_TIMEOUT_MS
constants.purpose: Global queue contract retained for next slice

constants.name: RENDER_PDF_JOB_TIMEOUT_MS
constants.purpose: Global queue contract retained for next slice

constants.name: PENDING_OBS_TIMEOUT_JOB_TIMEOUT_MS
constants.purpose: Global queue contract retained for next slice

sse_events.consumed_by: src/app/api/pipeline/events/route.ts and client components using PipelineSSEProvider

sse_events.emitted_by: Slice 3 extraction job publisher using same pubsub contract established in Slice 2
sse_events.consumed_by: Pipeline SSE stream clients for final stage update
EventSource clients and infrastructure monitors to keep stream alive

acceptance_criteria: Uploading a PDF under 50MB triggers pipeline and DocumentVersion.pipeline_status reaches embedded within 5 minutes p95
GET /api/documents/{id}/blocks returns at least one evidence block with hasEmbedding=true
GET /api/pipeline/events delivers pipeline_stage_changed within 2 seconds of each status transition
GET /api/documents/{id}/pages/1 returns pageImageUrl after OCR and returns 404 code page_not_ready before OCR completion
Blocks with ocr_confidence < 0.70 persist with low_confidence=true and embedding remains null
Client-side upload >50MB is rejected before /api/uploads/init call with French validation message
SSE stream with mismatched company_id returns 403 immediately
TypeScript compile and Vitest suite pass for added modules
Re-running OCR job for already completed version is no-op
Re-running OCR job for crashed ocr_processing version is allowed re-entry
POST /api/documents/{id}/retry resets failed or stale versions and enqueues ocr-job; returns 409 for non-retriable states
Stale-pipeline sweep marks versions stuck >10 minutes as failed and inserts notification
GET /api/documents/{id}/versions returns all document versions sorted by version DESC
POST /api/uploads/complete with duplicate objectKey returns 200 existing payload without duplicate rows

known_spec_deviations.reason: Slice text contains both uploaded and pending labels in flow examples; implementation standardizes on uploaded to match pipeline_status enum from Slice 1
Edge-case table mentions 409 while endpoint contract and acceptance require idempotent 200; implementation follows contract+acceptance and returns 200
Slice 2 uses in-memory replay buffer for pipeline events; this is acceptable for current scope and later chat replay is upgraded to Redis Streams in Slice 5
Source keeps this as an open pre-implementation decision (per-page vs per-file). Keep contract neutral until a validation call confirms PaddleOCR-VL multi-page support and timeout behavior.

The stale-pipeline sweep (workers/pipeline/cron/stale-pipeline.ts) is a BullMQ repeatable/cron job but is assigned to the existing `pending-obs-timeout` queue for convenience rather than a dedicated cron queue. This conflates unrelated queue semantics. In production this should be a dedicated cron queue. Source: implementation_plan.md §2.3 and §2.16.

implementation_order: Add shared validation and presign modules: src/lib/uploads/validate.ts and src/lib/uploads/presign.ts
Implement upload endpoints /api/uploads/init and /api/uploads/complete with idempotency and queue enqueue
Implement retry endpoint with retriable state gate and stale threshold check
Implement pipeline event contracts in src/lib/pipeline/events.ts and publisher in src/lib/pipeline/pubsub.ts
Implement SSE route /api/pipeline/events with heartbeat, company scoping, and Last-Event-ID replay
Create OCR utilities: pdf2pic conversion, PaddleOCR client, response parser with bbox normalization
Create chunking utilities: token counting, merge, split
Create embedding client utility for OpenAI batch embeddings
Implement pipeline workers: jobs/ocr.ts, jobs/embedding.ts, dlq.ts, health.ts, stale-pipeline cron
Modify workers/pipeline/index.ts to register queues, handlers, health endpoint, and scheduled sweep
Create UI components for documents table, status badge, upload flow, and upload retry overlay
Create PipelineSSEProvider and usePipelineStream hook and mount provider in src/app/(app)/layout.tsx
Create documents pages /documents and /documents/[id] with optimistic status updates
Run unit, integration, and E2E checks for upload flow, status transitions, idempotency, and stale recovery
